docket_entries.description: PER ORDER SIGNED ON 5/18/16, JUDGE GRANTED PAYMENT OF $225 DUE BY 6/17/16 FILED BY PETITIONER ABDI, MOHAMED OSMAN
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: FEES PAID BY PETITIONER MOHAMED ABDI ON 06/17/16. (206)
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER ABDI, MOHAMED OSMAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ABDI, MOHAMED OSMAN HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-18-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER MOHAMED ABDI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE AND REDUCED THE AMOUNT TO $225.00 FILING FEE OWED TO THE COURT, WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 6/17/16. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PETITIONER PRESENT IN COURT. PROOF OF PUBLICATION NOT REQUIRED. HEARING FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME NOT REQUIRED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: A. MOK AND M. GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
